revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image. Pixel-art game asset sheet, no extra files, no variants.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 320x180 px.
- Single frame only: 1 row x 1 column, frame size 320x180 px.
- Do not draw grid lines, borders, labels, frame numbers, text, watermark, UI, menus, cursors, characters, enemies, creatures, or props outside the requested silhouette band.

Asset purpose:
- background-piece / background for a 16-bit SNES/SFC-style JRPG/platformer far parallax battle-background layer.
- Distant skyline SILHOUETTE band only, intended for chroma key compositing.

Scene:
- A faint, pale, white-gold floating sky-city resting on top of a sea of clouds, seen from very far away near the horizon.
- The silhouette band occupies the vertical middle of the image, spanning wide horizontally but leaving clean magenta around all edges.
- Elegant shrine-like towers, thin spires, small tiered roof shapes, and one great torii-gate-like silhouette shape integrated into the skyline.
- Soft bright silhouette with minimal readable detail, slightly luminous against the empty flat background.
- Sea of clouds forms the base of the city: pale white-gold cloud band with crisp pixel clusters, no blur.
- Everything that is not the pale white-gold city silhouette and cloud base must be flat solid #FF00FF magenta.

Pixel art constraints:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art, hard square pixels, no antialiasing blur, no painterly gradients.
- Fine readable pixel clusters, consistent palette, top-left light source.
- Use a subtle one-pixel darker warm-gold outline/shadow where useful to define the silhouette, but keep the far-distance appearance faint and bright.
- Bright cheerful palette, no dark gloomy mood.
- No detached fragments: no isolated dust specks, pixel islands, seam slivers, leftover residue, or random particles.
- All artwork must remain comfortably inside the 320x180 frame, with solid #FF00FF chroma-key margin at every edge.

Avoid protected or unwanted content:
- No Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, bird, companion creature, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.
